headline: OpenAI's Financial Data Integration
summary: OpenAI is enabling direct bank account connections in ChatGPT, pushing AI-driven financial advice into far more sensitive territory. The real story isn't the feature — it's that AI models giving real-time financial advice sit outside the compliance frameworks traditional advisors operate under, a gap that will either accelerate AI-native regulatory tools or force new legislation.
